channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: ミレービスケット高知ローカルから全国区に 野村煎豆加工店【経済トレンド／わが社のあの時】

item.title: A total of $5.6 million was transferred Monday by the US cou…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: A total of $5.6 million was transferred Monday by the US court system, which had been holding the money, to an account set up for Carroll by her lawyer, Roberta Kaplan, according to a docket entry in the case Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: A total of $5.6 million was transferred Monday by the US court system, which had been holding the money, to an account set up for Carroll by her lawyer, Roberta Kaplan, according to a docket entry in the case Tuesday.

item.title: One day after announcing it, President #Trump said he was dr…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: One day after announcing it, President #Trump said he was dropping the imposition of an American fee of 20% on non-Iranian ships traveling through the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: One day after announcing it, President #Trump said he was dropping the imposition of an American fee of 20% on non-Iranian ships traveling through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Darline Graham, the late Sen. Lindsey Graham’s younger siste…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Darline Graham, the late Sen. Lindsey Graham’s younger sister, was sworn into the Senate to serve out the remainder of her brother’s term after his sudden death over the weekend. https://cnn.it/4bCsuKH
item.content:encoded: Darline Graham, the late Sen. Lindsey Graham’s younger sister, was sworn into the Senate to serve out the remainder of her brother’s term after his sudden death over the weekend. https://cnn.it/4bCsuKH

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Spain lead France 1-0 after…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Spain lead France 1-0 after the first half of their semifinal. "France are more rattled than we have seen at this World Cup, where they have so often been untouchable."

Dive into the half-time analysis: nyti.ms/454RYwE
item.content:encoded:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Spain lead France 1-0 after the first half of their semifinal. "France are more rattled than we have seen at this World Cup, where they have so often been untouchable."

Dive into the half-time analysis: nyti.ms/454RYwE

item.content:encoded:
【今日のこよみ】
2026年7月15日(水)
旧暦6月2日　先勝

十二直 あやぶ

潮回り 大潮
正午月齢 0.7
正午月相 0.8

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー PdMをやめて、"プロダクトビルダー"という働き方に変えました｜shikichee 3ヶ月前、Pd…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
PdMをやめて、"プロダクトビルダー"という働き方に変えました｜shikichee

3ヶ月前、PdMをやめました。 正確には、要件をまとめて開発チームに渡すこれまでのPdMの働き方をやめて、プロダクトビルダーという働き方に変えました。 PdMが自分で作らない人でいられる時代は終わったと思ったからです。 こんにちは、Ubieでプロダクトビルダーをしているしきち（shikichee）です。 AIエージェントを使...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
PdMをやめて、"プロダクトビルダー"という働き方に変えました｜shikichee

3ヶ月前、PdMをやめました。 正確には、要件をまとめて開発チームに渡すこれまでのPdMの働き方をやめて、プロダクトビルダーという働き方に変えました。 PdMが自分で作らない人でいられる時代は終わったと思ったからです。 こんにちは、Ubieでプロダクトビルダーをしているしきち（shikichee）です。 AIエージェントを使...

item.title: US derivatives regulator blocks Kalshi from canceling Michig…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: US derivatives regulator blocks Kalshi from canceling Michigan trades despite court order reut.rs/4wObo53
item.content:encoded: US derivatives regulator blocks Kalshi from canceling Michigan trades despite court order reut.rs/4wObo53

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com "I’ve been staging an experimen…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

"I’ve been staging an experiment for the past few months: I’ve removed all my social media apps — Instagram, Twitter, TikTok — and moved them onto an old iPhone I had lying around my house," Meher Ahmad writes. "I dubbed this phone my Scroll Phone."
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

"I’ve been staging an experiment for the past few months: I’ve removed all my social media apps — Instagram, Twitter, TikTok — and moved them onto an old iPhone I had lying around my house," Meher Ahmad writes. "I dubbed this phone my Scroll Phone."

item.title: US unseals charges, offers $10 million reward for info on Ru…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: US unseals charges, offers $10 million reward for info on Russian hackers reut.rs/3QXz5bP
item.content:encoded: US unseals charges, offers $10 million reward for info on Russian hackers reut.rs/3QXz5bP

item.title: JUST IN: US senators have unveiled their sweeping bipartisan…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: JUST IN: US senators have unveiled their sweeping bipartisan Russia sanctions bill, which they have urged Congress to quickly pass to honor of one its main sponsors, the late Sen. Lindsey Graham.
item.content:encoded: JUST IN: US senators have unveiled their sweeping bipartisan Russia sanctions bill, which they have urged Congress to quickly pass to honor of one its main sponsors, the late Sen. Lindsey Graham.

item.title: Researchers studying the 2022 World Cup found unexplainable …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Researchers studying the 2022 World Cup found unexplainable added time and that close scores affected how long first and second halves lasted.
item.content:encoded: Researchers studying the 2022 World Cup found unexplainable added time and that close scores affected how long first and second halves lasted.

item.title: New Russian sanctions legislation spearheaded by the late Se…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: New Russian sanctions legislation spearheaded by the late Senator Lindsey Graham and backed by Trump would target the top five purchasers of Russian crude oil and natural gas
item.content:encoded: New Russian sanctions legislation spearheaded by the late Senator Lindsey Graham and backed by Trump would target the top five purchasers of Russian crude oil and natural gas

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Michael Olise, France's bal…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Michael Olise, France's balletically brilliant footballer, is truly unique. Quick-witted and smart, the enigmatic player scored 127 on an IQ test in 2024. As for his football intelligence, it’s off the scale. nyti.ms/453LT3A
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Michael Olise, France's balletically brilliant footballer, is truly unique. Quick-witted and smart, the enigmatic player scored 127 on an IQ test in 2024. As for his football intelligence, it’s off the scale. nyti.ms/453LT3A

item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)

item.content:encoded: Justice Amy Coney Barrett, who was joined by Justice Elena Kagan, delivered an unusual and personal plea for additional security funding for the Supreme Court on Tuesday. https://cnn.it/4fBKPde

item.description: Breaking News: Forecasters issued a high-risk alert for excessive rain in parts of Texas, warning of potentially “catastrophic” flooding.

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: The International Olympic C…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: The International Olympic Committee has been asked to investigate whether Gianni Infantino was involved in the decision to suspend U.S. forward Folarin Balogun’s one-match World Cup ban — a claim the FIFA president, who is an IOC member, has denied.
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: The International Olympic Committee has been asked to investigate whether Gianni Infantino was involved in the decision to suspend U.S. forward Folarin Balogun’s one-match World Cup ban — a claim the FIFA president, who is an IOC member, has denied.

item.title: Slow-moving storms are drenching much of central Texas this …
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Slow-moving storms are drenching much of central Texas this week as a disturbance in the upper atmosphere collides with summer humidity to produce heavy rains.
item.content:encoded: Slow-moving storms are drenching much of central Texas this week as a disturbance in the upper atmosphere collides with summer humidity to produce heavy rains.

item.title: A look at State Affairs, whose statehouse coverage is used t…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
A look at State Affairs, whose statehouse coverage is used to train LLMs powering a Bloomberg Terminal-like product; it's raised $70M and has 76 editorial staff (Washington Post)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
A look at State Affairs, whose statehouse coverage is used to train LLMs powering a Bloomberg Terminal-like product; it's raised $70M and has 76 editorial staff (Washington Post)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
